response.justification: The candidate brings well over the required 6 years of fullstack experience, with current hands-on TypeScript/Node.js product work plus AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling — a direct hit on the rare 'AI agent development' requirement. React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker/Kubernetes, and a demonstrably deep testing culture (TDD, authored test frameworks, taught testing courses) cover most of the stack. The main gaps are no explicit Nest.js experience, frontend history that leans Ember over React outside one role, and no evidence of Kotlin or Python.
strengths: 15+ years of fullstack engineering with recent TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and AWS work
Current AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code-generator experience, matching the required AI agent development skill
Strong testing and craftsmanship background: TDD practitioner, author of test frameworks, and testing course instructor
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed anywhere in the resume
Much of the frontend history is Ember.js; React exposure is concentrated in one role
Kotlin and Python are not evidenced, and Java experience appears dated and limited

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP development experience
Missing Nest.js and limited recent React
